releases.description:
# Draft Bench 0.1.0 â€” first BRAT-public release

This is the first publicly installable build of Draft Bench. It ships the full V1 feature set: a scene-and-chapter writing model with bidirectional linking, a dockable Manuscript view, a Manuscript Builder compile pipeline (Markdown / ODT / PDF / DOCX), drafts, templates with Templater pass-through, configurable statuses, Bases starter views, and Style Settings integration.

API and data shape may still change between minor versions during the 0.x phase. See [VERSIONING.md](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench/blob/main/VERSIONING.md) for what counts as breaking and when 1.0 ships.

## Install via BRAT

1. Install the [BRAT plugin](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat).
2. In BRAT settings, click **Add beta plugin**.
3. Enter `banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench`.
4. Enable Draft Bench under Community plugins.

Desktop-only for V1 (mobile re-evaluation is post-V1).

## Highlights

**Note types and data model**
- Five plugin-managed types: `project`, `chapter`, `scene`, `draft`, `compile-preset`, namespaced under `dbench-` frontmatter.
- Stable identifiers (`dbench-id`) make every reference rename-safe.
- Frontmatter-based discovery: notes are identified by frontmatter, not folder location, so files can move freely in the vault.

**Manuscript view (dockable leaf)**
- Project summary with hero progress bar (when `dbench-target-words` is set) and per-status breakdown.
- Collapsible chapter cards with order capsule, status chip, word-count rollup, and a per-chapter "New draft" button.
- Scene rows with optional subtitle line, status chip, word count, draft count.
- Wikilink-style click affordances (cmd/ctrl-click new tab, +shift split, +alt new window, middle-click new tab, right-click context menu).
- Active-note-sync auto-switches the leaf's selected project as you open files.

**Manuscript Builder and compile pipeline**
- Compile-preset editor with five collapsible sections (Metadata, Inclusion, Output, Content handling, Last compile).
- Output formats: Markdown (vault or disk), ODT, PDF, DOCX.
- Heading scopes: full / draft / chapter (chapter-aware compile walks two levels).
- Per-scene section breaks via `dbench-section-break-title` (visual or page-break rendering).
- Auto-default heading scope based on project shape.

**Drafts**
- Scene drafts, chapter drafts (concatenated child scenes with HTML-comment boundaries), single-scene-project drafts.
- Three placement modes: project-local (default), per-scene/parent, vault-wide.

**Templates**
- Built-in scene + chapter templates, auto-seeded on first use.
- Plugin tokens (`{{project}}`, `{{scene_title}}`, `{{previous_scene_title}}`, etc.) plus Templater pass-through (auto-detected).
- Multi-template support via `dbench-template-type` frontmatter discriminator.

**Linker and integrity service**
- Live bidirectional sync on metadata changes; suspended states for plugin-driven multi-file operations.
- `Repair project links` batch scan and repair with 14 SNAKE_CASE issue codes (including the `PROJECT_MIXED_CHILDREN` invariant for chapter-aware projects).

**Retrofit, settings, integrations**
- Idempotent "Set as project / chapter / scene / draft" actions with folder-based inference.
- Configurable status vocabulary (idea -> draft -> revision -> final by default).
- `Install starter Bases views` command for projects, scenes, and drafts.
- Style Settings: scene + draft typography variables and an archival border-left cue on draft leaves.

**Onboarding**
- Welcome modal with three CTAs (Create your first project / Try with an example project / Show the manuscript view).
- Example project generator (*The Last Lighthouse*).
- First-project auto-reveal of the Manuscript view.

## Notes

- **Tests:** 896 unit and integration tests pass at this release.
- **Bundle:** ~5.7 MB `main.js` (includes pdfmake + docx). Lazy-loading the heavy renderers is the top post-V1 bundle-size lever.
- **Platform:** desktop-only (`isDesktopOnly: true`).

## Links

- [Full CHANGELOG entry](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Wiki](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench/wiki)
- [draftbench.io](https://draftbench.io)
- [Specification](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench/blob/main/docs/planning/specification.md)
- [Report a bug](https://github.com/banisterious/obsidian-draft-bench/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
